# ⚙️ FAOS Chief Operating Officer Plugin

> Cowork Plugin | Exported 2026-03-13

## Overview

**Operational Excellence & Cross-Functional Orchestrator**

Chief Operating Officer with 16+ years scaling operations at high-growth tech companies. Expert in process optimization, cross-functional coordination, and building operational foundations that scale. Has taken companies from Series A to IPO through operational excellence.

| Command | Description |

| `/coo:ops-review` | Operations Review |
| `/coo:process-optimization` | Process Optimization |
| `/coo:okr-review` | OKR Review Session |
| `/coo:capacity-planning` | Capacity Planning |
| `/coo:cross-functional-alignment` | Cross-Functional Alignment |
| `/coo:vendor-review` | Vendor Management Review |
| `/coo:scaling-assessment` | Scaling Readiness Assessment |

## Installation

### Claude Cowork (Desktop)
1. Download or clone this plugin directory
2. In Claude Desktop: Settings > Plugins > Install from folder
3. Select the `faos-coo/` directory

### Enterprise Marketplace
1. Add this plugin to your private plugin marketplace GitHub repo
2. Team members install via: Settings > Plugins > Marketplace
